title: Introduce start_async for DB loading on filter change
prompt: Write lib/my_app_web/live/product_search_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ProductSearchLive). On search event, use start_async(:search, fn -> MyApp.Catalog.search(query) end) instead of blocking the LiveView. handle_async(:search, {:ok, results}, socket) streams the results with reset: true. A :loading assign is set true when search starts and false on completion. Use phx-debounce="300" on the input.
tier_rationale: start_async + stream reset combo is modern and non-trivial.
